evals.prompt: Write an OpenMW Lua player script that shows a message when I press K, include the .omwscripts line and mention how to hot reload it.
evals.expected_output: Uses a PLAYER script, openmw.ui or appropriate input handler, returns engineHandlers with onKeyPress, includes PLAYER: path entry and reloadlua note.

evals.prompt: Review this OpenMW Lua local NPC script for API misuse: it calls openmw.world from onUpdate, edits a nearby actor directly, and scans openmw.nearby inside onSave.
evals.expected_output: Flags context violations, explains local script mutation limits, explains nearby inactive/save-load restriction, recommends openmw.self/events/global script where appropriate.

evals.prompt: Create an OpenMW Lua load script that adds or edits content records, and tell me which package and .omwscripts flag it needs.
evals.expected_output: Chooses LOAD context, uses openmw.content, avoids runtime world APIs, includes LOAD: .omwscripts entry and relevant record/content caveats.
